_notes.backend: Choose one transcription backend: azure (cloud), mlx (Apple Silicon local), or faster-whisper (CPU/local).
_notes.local_model: Local model install locations live here. Use download_repo only as the source when fetching model weights.
_notes.azure: For cloud mode, fill azure.endpoint and sign in from the app.

local_model._note: Local transcription settings. install_dir is the local model directory; download_repo is the source to fetch it from if missing.

azure._note: Used when backend is 'azure' and/or polish_engine is 'azure'.
